This generally feels like rec room  its one of the most fun rec room remakes yet. It captures the social and interactive feel that made games like Rec Room so enjoyable while adding its own unique style and personality. The environments are colorful, the gameplay is engaging, and it’s easy to meet and play with other people. The developers have clearly put a lot of effort into making the experience enjoyable,

Ever since the rec room shutdown I was sad to not be able to play my favorite game but less than a month later I see this and at first it looks odd because the photos are a low quality gorilla tag forest no offense, but don’t be fooled once I got in I was speech less. OG REC ROOM something I never got to see I finally got to see here and it feels better than actual rec room where unlike the p2w aspect of cosmetics now you have to earn tokens which keeps me coming back to earn more tokens and get more cosmetic sets overall the game is the best rec room copy/revival I’ve ever seen mainly because it doesn’t require discord which kept me from playing things like radium or vanilla not to mention that the load times for rooms feel faster than rec room itself whoever the creator of meownet is, thank you for bringing the joy of rec room back to me

I think it could be improved over time the quest are nice its around the time i started playing 2019-2023 i would focus on 
Improvements like bug fixes maybe add a voice moderation that automatically has a list of words that it looks for when people say stuff they are not supposed to or it automatically looks for games that promote free tokens and removes them this would make the game better
